briefing.art: The 2026 Whitney Biennial continues to explore 'slow-burn' contemporary themes. Global art market resilience remains at 4% growth, led by the U.S. market.
briefing.stocks: Markets are reacting to the Fed's 3.5-3.75% rate hold. Energy stocks are benefiting from the Iran/Hormuz crisis, while growth sectors face pressure from 'higher for longer' rate expectations.

머스크.raw:
🎨📈 **[오후 주식 브리핑: AMZN & INTC]**

안녕하세요, 슬기님! 오늘(3월 19일) 업데이트된 시장 소식입니다. 아마존은 AWS 매출 성장세와 AI 인프라 투자로 견조한 흐름을 유지 중이며, 인텔은 18A 공정 생산과 칩스법 기반의 리더십 탈환을 목표로 하고 있습니다.

FT.raw: FT Daily Briefing: Markets are volatile due to the Iran-Hormuz crisis driving oil prices up. The Fed maintains 'higher for longer' rates (3.5-3.75%). MSFT is considering legal action against AWS/OpenAI, and AI safety regulations are under growing scrutiny.

카리나.raw: Art market update: High demand for immersive media art at Tate Modern and strong activity in the Asian gallery scene (Seoul/Hong Kong) with new global partnerships.
